description_long: This object is a simple, upright gravestone or headstone, commonly found in graveyards or cemeteries. It features a flat, rectangular base supporting a vertically oriented slab with a gently arched top and chamfered upper corners. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative elements. The color is a uniform dark gray, suggesting it is made from stone or concrete. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for marking a burial site. Its proportions and thickness indicate it is a solid, heavy object intended to remain fixed in place.
description: A plain, upright dark gray gravestone with a rectangular base and arched top, made of stone or concrete. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the gravestone, with its arched top and rectangular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the gravestone and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical in shape to the front, showing the back face of the gravestone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and depth of the base.
